stemHtml: How is the meteorological visibility determined in the METAR?

options.a: It is the greatest value which is reached at least within half of the horizon as seen from the aerodrome.
options.b: The maximum determined by a meteorologist in a 360° scan at the horizon.
options.c: The lowest observed in a 360° scan from the meteorological station.
options.d: Given by transmissometer when the visibility is below 1 500 metres.
